Title: GLIMPSE
Chapter_Text:
A little sneak peak ~

Poora plan paani me gya chappak,Mera jooth paani me gya chappak chappak.

Well, I can take theplanout of thePaani.

•••

"It's puzzling that Shubman is capable of pulling someone like you."

•••

It can't be my MMS? I never got involved in those activities? A video of me naked? Nah, no way. I mean, who could have possibly put a camera in my bathroom?

•••

"Pimples" I ask confusedly.

"Yeah pimples they appear when you smile"

"You mean dimples?"

"Yeah.... same....no... difference."

•••

Obeying her, I go towards Ishan and hug him. Not the teammate wala hug, but more like - *OMG, I am so happy I just made my maiden 50, let me just hug my boyfriend* wala hug.

•••

Fake relationship, fake boyfriend, fake dates-the word "fake" sums up my current life quite accurately.

•••

My worries turn into frustration. "Yeah, you told me how fine you were. Oh my god, did I forget to mention how absolutely stunning you looked yesterday? And today, how glad I was to find out that you were gone and no one knows anything about your whereabouts, and on top of all this, His Royal Highness decides to keep his phone on silent so his peasant can't reach him." I finish my little sarcastic monologue, and he starts smiling. THE AUDACITY.

•••

I look at him with a pitiful smile. "Did you forget to take your pills?"

"What kind of pills?"

"Anti-delusional pills!"

He rolls his eyes.

•••

He ruffles my already unkempt hair with affection, and I can feel a layer of warmth spreading over my chest. I might just melt here.

•••

I fix his gold chain. "My choice is really good," I declare with a satisfied smile. He looks toward me with a hint of amusement in his expression."I mean the shirt, it's my choice, right?" I say teasingly. He acts as if he knew I was talking about the shirt and not about anything else."Of course, you mean the shirt," he responds, his tone a little defensive but cute.

•••

I have to intervene now. I try to say something, "Listen-" but before I can say anything further, I hear the swift footsteps of Ishan approaching me.

Before I can make sense of anything, with a bold gesture, he seizes the lapel of my tuxedo, pulling me towards him. And then, he presses his lips to mine.

•••

And in this moment, I realize that I am in love with him. I am in love with my teammate. I am in love with my friend. I am in love with my fake boyfriend.

I AM IN LOVE WITH ISHAN, and it's not good.

•••

I should have felt relieved to confess to him, but to my pure horror, he slowly opens his eyes, and I quickly shut mine.

•••

"Ishan!" Rahul bhaiya shouts from the field. This is the second time Rahul bhaiya has come to my rescue without even knowing it. I could practically kiss his feet right now, but then Ishan might see me, so I have to drop the plan.

~~~

Previously, this section was a dull introduction, so I changed it and inserted some random dialogues and paragraphs from the book.

Thank you for giving this book a chance, I hope you have a pleasant experience while readingthis.

~SINA💌🥀

Title: Chapter : 01
Chapter_Text:
•SHUBMAN GILL•

I would have been munching on choco pies and watching Netflix or playing FIFA if only I haven't opened my mouth and said something which I was not supposed to say, If only my mouth have co-operated with my brain .

But Alas! here I am regretting those words and now I am inDEEPtrouble.

"Where is he? it's already half an hour, Is he coming or not?" My mom said giving me a pointed look.

The'he'in question is my non-existent boyfriend. Confused enough?

Well Let me first introduce myself, So hello people, I am Shubman Gill, 25 and A member of Indian cricket team. And also I am bi- YES I am bisexual, andonlymy family knows this. When I was 20 my sister, sheen outed me to my family including myself, Yup, you heard that right my sister outed me toME. Because she is my sister and she knows everything, apparently.

My family members especially my mom keep nagging at me to get into a relationship. According to her being 25 means you are one step away from being un-date-ble. I get her lectures atleast 3 times a week, she said'You are 25 now, isn't it easy to find a partner when you are a bi?'. Who is going to tell her that being bi doesn't mean that you are attracted to every other person of your age.

Two days ago was one such day when I was being graced by her words that how important is to have a partner or to have someone who care for you and supports you, blah blah blah. She was saying it almost angrily. And God knows what posses me when I said "mom I do have a boyfriend".That was so sudden that along with my mom I was also not able to believe what I said.

And when she asked for 'his' name I said "ummm..well it's a surprise" yeah a suprise for me too.

So here I am in a resturant sitting with my family and waiting for my 'boyfriend' because my family wanted to meet 'him'

If only I have said that I have a girlfriend it would have been so easy to fake some girl as my girlfriend. But a boyfriend? Where do I search for a boyfriend? more precisely afakeboyfriend.

"He messaged me that he is stuck in traffic, it will take some time" I lied.

My sister gave me a look which basically said: 'I can see through your bullshit.'

I reall don't know what to do, I am feeling guilty to see the excitement on my mom's face. I just cannot say : 'Aprilfool guys, I have no boyfriend'

But I could say that 'he' will not be able to make it here today because of some urgent work. Right, this is the only option I have right now and it will also give me some time to think about what to do next, either tell them that I lied or present someone as my boyfriend.

We were sitting in the outer setting of the restaurant. "I am calling him" I said grabbing my phone from the table, and starts walking toward the inside of the restaurant. "But phone signals are suppose to come outside not inside" sheen said arching an eyebrow. I ingnored her and kept walking towards the restaurant to use the Restroom and to calm my self.

When I reached inside, a cricket fan recognised me, "Shubman Gill? Oh my god, I can't believe I am meeting you right now" the fan says excitedly. "Can I take a selfie with you?"After the selfie(s) were done, the fan says, "All the best for your upcoming matches, I know you'll rock as always" the enthusiasm in his voice is contagious. "Thank you so much" I say trying to match his enthusiasm.

After he left, someone catches my  attention, A familiar face. I walked a few step to see that person clearly. Yes it's him Ishan. Ishan Kishan, my fellow team mate.

~~~

Title: Chapter : 02
Chapter_Text:
•SHUBMAN GILL•

He was sitting by the far end of the restaurant, it looks like he was waiting for someone as the other chair was empty.

But what was he doing here?

It's been a few months since I started playing for India, The team was nothing but welcoming towards me, Seniors treat me like their little brother, but I am still not that close with every member of the team and Ishan Kishan is one of them.

He got selected in ICT even before me. We haven't played too many games together, but the ones we played, we had great partnership of runs together. I really like his playing style.

He seems like a fun loving person, Whenever I had any interaction with him,which are very few, He always tried to make me comfortable as I am not very great at mingling with people.

My chain of thoughts got broken when he too noticed me and waved towards me, I glanced outside where my family was sitting then walk towards him.

"Hi Shubman" he gestured me to sit.

"Hello, What are you doing here?"OhGREAT, my communication skills just died a hundred deaths, because why on earth my first question is 'What are you doing here?'as if I own this place and he is not allowed to come here.

"I was waiting for my friend and seems like he ain't coming" He answered with a smile not minding the sheer rudeness of my question.

He asked "Are you here with someone",

"Yup, with my family" I said pointing outside where they were sitting.

"Don't mind me asking this but don't you live in Mumbai? If I am not mistaken. So you here in Delhi?" I asked, carefully putting my words to not to sound rude.

"Yeah, I live in mumbai but for the time being I am living with my brother here in Delhi" He answered politely.

"Oh okay" I said not knowing what else to say and then "wanna come say Hi to my family?"

"Yeah, sure. Why not?" Without any hesitation, he stands up. If I were in his place, I would have made some excuses not to meet his family. Don't get me wrong, I just get anxious when meeting new people, and I forget how to behave. But that's not the case here. Ishan seems very chill about it.

As we were stepping outside, an idea struck my mind. "Ishan, wait," I said, pulling his hand gently to stop him. I withdrew immediately, questioning myself,Can I not keep my hand to myself?Nevermind.

"Huh?" He looked at me perplexed.

"I need your help" I said pleadingly.

"Help as in?" I gestured him to sit. He was confused but obeyed me anyway.

He was looking at me and waiting for me to speak, and I don't know where to start and I was second guessing myself.

"Um, actually..."Will he understand my situation, or would he make fun of me because of the kind of mess I've made? Or would he deny to help me? Should I tell him or not?I thought.

Aarrhhhh Chuck the overthinking, I took a long sharp breath "Can you please  pretend to be my boyfriend infront of my family?" finally I omitted the words. OKAY THIS ISEMBARASSING.

"Sorry?" His eyebrows knit together, either he didn't heard me or  didn't believe what he heard, probably it's the later.

"Actually I lied to my family that I have a boyfriend, and now they wanted to meet him, can you please be my fake boyfriend for a day?" I wait for him to laugh on my situation "And you just have to pretend for now only."

He managed to say, "But I am straight"

Did I ask ?"So am I"I am lying, but why? Bas aise hi mann tha mera.

Now he was even more confused. he opened his mouth to say something but I cut him off  "The thing is my family is waiting outside for my 'boyfriend'to arrive, and I need someone to pretend as my boyfriend, So Can you please....."I said leaving out thestraight which-I-Am-Notpart.

"I don't have the guts to tell them that I lied" I said making a very innocent face.

I can bet on my sunglasses that he is trying so hard to supress his laugh. O God please let this earth swallow my existence. This is so embarrassing, asking your team mate to be your fake boyfriend, I have seen better days.

After a long nerve wrecking pause he spoke "Well, I don't find any problem with Pretending to be your boyfriend just to put a show infront of your family but......"

But what?

".......won't they find it suspicious that you are dating you team mate and you kept it a secret from them?" He completed his sentence.

Nice question but I have the answer hehe.

"No it won't be because when mom asked me about my boyfriend's name, I said it's a suprise. So me dating you would make a lot more sense to them then me dating any other random person"

"Ohh, perfect... feels like the childhood dream I had of becoming an actor is going to be fulfilled" He said with a playful grin.

His words put a genuine smile on my face because thank fuck, he is finally going to help me and I couldn't be more grateful.

"Thank you so much Ishan"

I told him to make his entry two minutes after me so they don't find it suspicious. As I walk back to where my family was sitting I told them, "He is going to be here any moment."

Exact two minutes later, Ishan came into view, I waved at him Pretending as if I wasn't coaxing him to be my fake boyfriend a few minutes ago inside the restaurant.

Standing up I put a bright smile on my face "Meet my boyfriend" damn, Why I was being so cheesy?Both Mom and Sheen looked at him with a confused look, before mom could say anything, Ishan bend down to touch her feet.

Well nice starting, full points for the sanskars, mom must be impressed as she smiled and said "Ishan? Hain na". Yeah she recognised him.

"Ji aunty" replied Ishan.

We both sat down side by side, Sheen was giving us a perplexed look. I thought she was still not buying the drama.

"Ishan Kishan right? You are Shubman's teammate" Sheen interrogated.

"Yes di" said Ishan maintaing a smiling face.

Meanwhile my mom was busy admiring Ishan, By the looks that she was giving both of us I could bet on my watch that she was planning our marriage in her head for sure.

"When did you two start dating" Now I know for sure that Sheen knew something is fishy that's the reason she was being this interrogative.

"Like a week ago" I said nonchalantly.

"And how exactly this started?"What? I was not prepared for this questioning session, When I didn't say anything, her eyes darted towards Ishan.Please god save us I promise I will never lie to anyone, please save us from this mess.

Under the table, Ishan gently placed the palm of his hand on my kneecap as I was shaking my leg vigorously.

Then he starts speaking.

~~~

Title: Chapter : 03
Chapter_Text:
•SHUBMAN GILL•

"Actually, it all started when we were in Bangalore. We were assigned the same room, and because of that, we became good friends. We also went on a fewoutings together. Turns out, we have similar likings."

Bruh? He is spewing lies like anything, I myself would have believed him. The expression on his face was maintained throughout, seriously nothing could give away that he was lying.

I am quite impressed by his acting skills, not gonna lie, He would have made into a great actor."and then like a week ago we decided to give ourselves a chance" he concluded looking at me.

Sheen's expression softened a little, I could only hope that she believed into the utter lie Ishan just spat out.

After sheen's interrogation, my mom started chatting with him, but unlike Sheen she is asking him about his family and stuff.

I relaxed visibly, my tension easing eventually, Ishan seems more than happy to answer my mom's question, as they both are busy chattering me and Sheen ordered some food.

Everything was going smoothly when -"You came home late that day, were you two together?"

"No"

"Yes"

Me and Ishan spoke at the same time.

Poora plan paani me gya chappak,Mera jooth paani me gya chappak chappak.

Well, I can take theplanout of thePaani.

"I mean yes, We were together that day but it's not the reason of me being late on that day, actually my manager called me because of some paper work for which I went to the office and later got stuck in traffic" I said calmly, and It's not entirely a lie if we just remove the 'We were together that day'part then It's completely true.

"Ohh"

If ishan was panicking because of the blunder that we almost made , he didn't let it show on his face.

We were almost done when my eyes noticed what Ishan was wearing. He was wearing a black Tshirt which says:

'HIGH ON HOPIUM AND COPIUM'

A little chuckle escaped from my mouth, which caught the attention of all three of them. "Nothing," I said, dismissing their looks.

I was truly grateful for Ishan's help, I never imagined that this day would turn out like this. What would have happened if Ishan had not been here? I guess then I would have had to tell them the truth, which wasn't an option either.

I was feeling a little guilty too because sooner or later I'll be telling them that me and Ishan broke up, but that's on the future. Let me enjoy my time with my family and fake boyfriend.

"Go, bring some Icecream from there" Sheen pointed to a famous Ice cream parlour which was a few steps away from the restaurant that we were sitting in.

"Why? We can order from here na" I protested

"Nope, Their Ice creams are the best" Sheen retorted

"I agree with her" spoke Ishan.

"Are you trying to be in her good books" I asked rasing an eyebrow.

"Hello, He is already in my good books" Sheen answered.

Well he will not be in your good books anymore if you'll find out the truth that how convincingly he was lying a few minutes ago.

"Ishan you are suppose to support me"I whined acting like I was his real bf.

"Stop whining Shub and go get me the ice cream" Sheen ordered.

"Take Ishan with you" said my mom.She can be a little over sometimes.

When we were away from their hearing range, Ishan let out a laugh, his eyes crinkling, I noticed his face as I was walking very closer to him. He has big doe eyes, his hair have soft curls. This was the very first time I noticed him from this close, even though I knew him from months.His white perly teeths, in full display as he was laughing.

He isbeautiful.

"I can't believe I have just done that" He said amused by his own self.

"You are quite an actor, I almost believed whatever you said to them" I said complimenting him.

"But you are a terrible one" He looked at me.

"I am offended"

"No, but your expressions are a dead give away"

I agree with him.

As we entered the Icecream shop, A group  consisting around five six people squealed in joy and rushed towards us.

"ISHAN KISHAN" one of them jumped in excitement.

"SHUBMAN Gill" another person chimed in.

"Omg omg omg Can we get your autographs" A girl with specs asked excitedly.

One of them took out a notebook from her bag, Ishan gave his autograph to all of them, and then I signed it as well.

After that, we all gathered for a selfie. Ishan and I are standing side by side, surrounded by  fans.

This is one of the best perks of being a cricketer in India, the kind of love and admiration you receive from your very own people is unmatched. You may have never met them, yet they still pray for you and wish for your success. It amazes me sometimes.

Ofcourse It has its downsides too but we are not going to talk about that right now.

After the pictures were done they said their good byes. On the counter I ordered  mixed fruit Ice-Creams for mom and Sheen and one vanilla for myself. "Which flavour do you like" I asked him as he was busy in his phone, texting someone.

"Ahh.. Mint chocolate chip" he said momentarily looking away from his phone.

"Seriously? That shit taste like toothpaste" I can't with people who like mint chocolate flavour.

He narrowed his eyes at me, "Naah man it's the best Icecream flavour" and again got busy in his phone.

I reluctantly ordered mint chocolate chip flavour too. For him.

When we were returning, "Thank you so much Ishan for your help" I thanked him once again.

"What would you have done if I weren't here?"

I just shrugged, not knowing what I would have done without him.

When we start digging at our Ice creams, mom took out her phone and clicked a picture of us she even asked me to put my hand on Ishan's shoulder so she could get a desired picture of me and him.

*Clicks*

If only my future self had warned about this moment.

Title: Chapter : 04
Chapter_Text:
•ISHAN KISHAN•

As Shubman was ordering Ice-cream, my phone pinged with a notification.

Mayank:I am sorry sweetheart, I won't be able to come today.

Me:

I already guessed it, seriously mayank ? Tune hi plan banaya, aur fir khud cancel kr diya ?

Mayank:Arrey Sorry na baba! I wason the way but my colleaguecalled me because he neededsome documents, and mylaptop was not with me,so I have to go all the way back.

Me:

For how many days are you in Delhi?

Mayank:Pata nahi yrr, mai managerhoon Firbhi apne Mann seleave nhi le skta.

Me:😂😂

Mayank:😑😑

Me:Seems like your boss is in love with youTabhi tere ko khud se duur nhi krta.

Mayank:Mere pyaar me hi na marr jayeVo.

Me:Arrey bas bas.

Mayank:Chal fir do-teen din me planbanate hain.

Me:Okayyy.

"Which flavour do you like" Shubman asked me from the counter.

"Ahh.. Mint chocolate chip" I answered momentarily looking away from the phone

He scrunched his nose at my response"Seriously? That shit taste like toothpaste" He said grimacing.

This is very offensive, how can he talk like this about THE best ice cream flavour in the world? I can't with people who dislike mint chocolate chip flavour.

"Naah man it's the best ice cream flavour" I replied politely, keeping some unkind words to myself.

He almost gagged while ordering that flavour.

he is so dramatic.

How the events turned out today, I was supposed to meet Mayank at the restaurant as he was in Delhi as well.

Mayank is my childhood bestfriend, He works in banglore as a manager.

But rather than meeting him, I end up meeting my fellow team mate Shubman Gill, when I first saw him in the restaurant he was looking at me with a thoughtful expression.

I never in my wildest dream thought that one day someone will ask me to be their fake boyfriend, Let alone Shubman asking me. It's crazy if you think about it.

And what is more wild to me is that he himself told me that he is straight. Then why did he lie about having a boyfriend? He could have lied about having a girlfriend instead.

Why can't he tell the truth to his family? And came out of the closet, but in reverse?

I agreed to help him, but when I saw the hapiness in his mother's eyes I felt guilty, it wasn't right. but I cannot back off at that point.

Even though his sister interrogated us, his mother was so sweet, it felt nice to have some words with her.

When Sheen di asked him about how our relationship started, Shubman looked like a deer caught in the headlight.

The few interaction I had with him during our matches he doesn't seem very talkative person, but today I see a slightly different side of him.

We almost messed up our plan by giving different anwers to sheen Di's question though by the grace of God, Shubman was able to save us both.

As we both made our way back to the table, I began to feel a sense of foreboding, as if something very wrong were about to happen. But what? What could possibly go wrong?The worst thing that could happen is Shubman's mom finding out the truth! Is there something even worse than that, or am I just overthinking?

"How are you finding him lately" Sheen di asked but not in a questionable manner rather out of pure curiosity.

Shubman stopped digging at his vanilla ice cream and looked at sheen "Can you stop this session of yours now?" He said with a stern expression on his face.

Sheen di just shrugged and said, "Never mind, I was just asking." Then she gave me a long, thoughtful look and remarked, "It's puzzling that Shubman is capable of pulling someone like you."

He coughed, his eyes going wide at his sister's statement , "What do you mean" he asked her, looking offended.

"You know what I mean" she mimicked him while replying.

Shubman wanted to give her a befitting reply, but his brain couldn't come up with one. So he resumed eating his ice cream. While I just smiled at their banter, it must be good to have a sister.

Even though this day takes some utterly unexpected turn, It felt good.

If only I had been warned by my future self, then it wouldn't have felt so good.

~~~

___________________________________________

You all must be aware of what happened last evening, BCCI removed some of their players from the central contract. Ishan and Shreyas are two of them.

Ishan asked for a break due to mental fatigue. Just after that, his negative PR started: hundreds of articles, numerous speculations, bashing, and whatnot.

He wasn't ready for red ball cricket as he was improving his technique regarding test cricket. So he decided to make a comeback through T20 DY Patil Cup. He even asked for a NOC.

But what happened? He got sacked from the BCCI central contract. He was mentally fatigued, and BCCI made it ten times worse for him by Constantly telling him to play Ranji and then saying, 'at least play some cricket.' And then finally removing him from the contract.

Okay! If Ishan got removed because he wasn't playing international cricket for a long time(they were only benching him after his good knocks in those matches)then what about Shreyas? He played throughout the WC 2023. After Virat and Rohit, he is the third Indian with the most runs in WC 2023. And not just that, he played the 1st and 2nd tests between India and England, which is as recent as it gets. He got removed too. WHY? Just because he didn't play a Ranji Match?

Okay! If Shreyas got removed for not giving importance to domestic cricket, then what about Yuzi? He was playing Domestic, be it Vijay Hazare Trophy or Ranji. He too got sacked from the central contract.

They have criteria for 'getting back in the central contract' but no criteria for removal? Because in the end, everything boils down to:

'BCCI KI MARZI'

And as if all this was not enough, they even mentioned:

"Ishan and Shreya were not considered for the central contract in this round of recommendation."

Shows how much BCCI's ego got hurt because of these two players.

There are different rules for different players. Shows how much power and money matters. Your talent comes second, and connections comes first.

F*** BCCI but the reality is BCCI is f***ing everyone else. Especially players who don't have power and connections with influential figures.

Probably andHopefullywe'll get to see Ishan making his International comeback in the Zimbabwe tour of India, in July which is just after T20 WC 2024.

Though one good thing happened, Shubman Gill got promoted to grade A.

Title: Chapter : 05
Chapter_Text:
•SHUBMAN GILL•

It's been two days since I pulled that stunt with Ishan in front of Mom and Sheen. And since that day, it's been so peaceful in my life. Mom stopped lecturing me about dating. Whenever I go out, they think that I am meeting Ishan. Whenever I am on my phone, they think that I am talking pr chatting with Ishan. LOL I don't even have his number.

But the reality is, I am enjoying all this because I've been playing games, going out, and just chilling, and no one has said anything to me. Especially Mom, she is a little bit too happy nowadays.

Yeah, I have to take away that happiness from her sooner by telling her that Ishan and I broke up. But that's not my problem, that's future Shubman's problem. So let me be in peace for now.

We still don't have any matches for another two weeks. I practice in the morning and hang out with my friends in the evening. Life seems a little bit too blissful now, plus I don't have any relationship commitments, so it's a win-win situation for now.

As I am lost in these thoughts, my phone buzzes, and Shreyas's name flashes on the screen.

"Shubman, are you free tomorrow?" Shreyas said directly, coming to the point.

"Yeah, I am."

"Me and Surya are going on a road trip, wanna come?"

Going on a road trip with them doesn't sound bad. I have been friends with Shreyas and Surya Bhai even outside the field. We get along together really well.

"I am in," I answered.

"Great, I will pick you up tomorrow."

---

I don't know when I dozed off playing Survivalcraft on my phone. When a hint of consciousness drew upon me and I opened my eyes, I wondered if it's morning or evening.

One thing I realized is that my phone has been buzzing continuously for the past five minutes. I tap on the green icon without seeing who it is.

"SHUBMAN, WHAT THE FUC-........." I immediately distance the phone from my ear otherwise, it would have deafened me for sure.

I realize two things: first, the person on the other end is my manager, and second, he seems mad, like really mad.

But when isn't he mad? Even at the smallest inconvenience, he goes berserk.

I again bring the phone closer to my ear, still maintaining some distance. "What happened, Darshan?" I ask him calmly, knowing fully that the reply is not going to be calm.

"ARE YOU SLEEPING AT THIS TIME? IT'S SIX IN THE EVENING," he says, frustration visible in his voice.

I check the time, and he is correct! It's evening, and I have been sleeping senselessly for the past three hours.

Does he mad at me because I was sleeping? Huh?

"Is that the reason you are bursting my eardrums?" I ask him with a hint of sarcasm in my voice.

Darshan, my manager, is hardly a year or two older than me, but he still bosses me around. He is grumpy as hell, he even gets mad when I don't pick up his call in one go. And sometimes I do that intentionally to get on his nerves.

Sometimes he literally makes me feel like I am his manager, not the vice versa.

He knows his business, and he is very efficient with it. I never doubted his capabilities. But damn, he needs to behave sometimes.

"SHUBMAN. YOU. KNOW. WHAT. HAVE. YOU. DONE?" he asks with as much calmness as he can gather, which is none.

"No, I don't. Please enlighten me."

He sighs on the other end and speaks. "I have sent you something. Please read that and call me back, I don't have the energy and time to narrate everything." He then ends the call, leaving me more confused than before.

As I open my inbox, there is a link sent by him.

It must be some collaboration deal that he wants me to read, but isn't this his job? To read stuff and get the deal done? So why is he asking me to do so now?

And also, why was he overreacting like that over a deal?

I shrug off the questions and head towards the bathroom to wash my face. I will read the deal later.

It can wait.

Now it's been half an hour since that call, and I haven't opened that link yet. And my phone is buzzing again, with Darshan's name flashing on it.

"I am reading that," I say this in one breath and cut the call before he can start shouting at me for not calling him back.

Now, this feels ominous. What is in the link that Darshan is so eager to make me read? It can't be a simple deal document.

And now, I am feeling a little anxious to open that link. But what could have possibly gone wrong?

As I open the message again, my thumb hovers over that link, my heartbeat speeding up a little.

It can't be my MMS? I never got involved in those activities? A video of me naked? Nah, no way. I mean, who could have possibly put a camera in my bathroom?

Then what is it? I finally click on the link, and it opens into an article.

I scroll it down and start reading it. With each line, my heartbeat goes up and up, my eyes widening. I never imagined that I would read something like this ever in an article.

It's worse than my worst-case scenarios, and now I know why Darshan was that furious.

What have I done?

~~~

Title: Chapter : 06
Chapter_Text:
•SHUBMAN GILL•

Article

Indian Cricket's Secret Romance Unveiled: Does the two youngsters of ICT are dating?

Right now the cricketing world is buzzing with rumors and speculations, and amidst this whirlwind, a new revelation emerges – one that shatters expectations and ignites curiosity....................Read further to know more..............................

On a Saturday afternoon, In a famous Delhi restaurant where families were enjoying brunch, and amongst them, a young Indian cricket star, Shubman Gill, casually dining with loved ones. Seemingly ordinary, until a chance encounter with a journalist in the same restaurant unfolds a startling revelation.

As fate would have it, our keen-eyed journalist found himself sharing a moment with Gill, capturing a selfie with him as proof of their brief encounter. However, what followed was beyond imagination. Gill, it appeared, was not alone, he introduced another promising talent of Indian cricket, Ishan Kishan, as his boyfriendto his family.

Yes, you read it correctly – Shubman Gill and Ishan Kishan are reportedly in a relationship. According to eyewitness accounts, their romance is in its early stages, having blossomed just a week ago as heard by our journalist. Fueling speculation further, Gill's recent social media post featuring him and Kishan, without any caption, seems to validate these whispers of love.

What makes this revelation all the more intriguing is the apparent discretion maintained by the duo. Despite their on-field interactions, their off-field connection remained veiled from public scrutiny. Perhaps, they chose to keep their blossoming romance hidden from the prying eyes of fans and the media alike.

Accompanying this revelation is a blurry yet telling photograph captured by our journalist, offering a glimpse into the secretive rendezvous between Gill and Kishan at the restaurant.

In the ever-engaging drama of cricket, this unexpected twist adds a new dimension, leaving fans  eager to unravel the mysteries of Indian cricket's covert romance.

2 hours ago.

Expression:718k.

___________________________________________

What the actual f-  that bitch journalist, he was acting like a fan and........ Hold on a second. I scroll up the article a bit.

"Fueling speculation further, Gill's recent social media post featuring him and Kishan, without any caption."

When did I post a picture of me and him? I open my Instagram and click on my profile.

How is this even possible? There's actually a post of us together, and it's the latest one. I don't even have this picture, then how—oh well, I know how.

I remember when my phone wasn't working well, I logged into my Insta ID on Mom's phone, and later I forgot to log out, which means Mom posted this photo, thinking it's her profile and not mine.

She posted the pic, thinking it's her account because her account is private.

Haha, NOW I'M ROYALLY SCREWED.

I just want to dig a hole and jump in it.

My heartbeat hasn't returned to its normal rhythm yet as I dial Darshan's number. He picks up on the first ring.

"Did you read that?" He asks immediately after picking up.

"Hmmm," I don't feel like saying anything.

"CONGRATULATIONS," sarcasm dripping from his voice.

"Darshan."

"If you wanted to keep your relationship a secret, couldn't you be a little responsible?" He asks genuinely.

"Actually, Ishan and I are not in a relationship."

"So you broke up?"

"No."

"Then?"

"We were never in a relationship."

"So whatever this article is saying is utter nonsense?"

"No, it's true. I mean, whatever that journalist heard or saw, it actually happened."

"You're confusing me now," he says with a hint of irritation in his voice.

"Ummm... I asked Ishan to pretend to be my boyfriend in front of my family because they think I have a boyfriend... He was just helping me... and we are not in any relationship. Hell, we don't even know each other that well."

He listens patiently and continues to be silent. A moment passes without any words spoken, and then with a very measured tone, he says, "This is some big mess. We have to do something."

"Yeah, but what? Should I deny all this?"

"No, don't do anything right now, otherwise, this thing is going to get more fuel."

"Then?"

"I am arranging a meeting tomorrow. I will contact Ishan's manager as well. We all should discuss this before taking any steps."

Ishan, yeah, I totally forgot that he is as involved in this mess as I am. How am I going to face him, knowing well that I am the reason his name is being dragged into all this?

"Okay," I say to him in a low voice.

---

Sheen is on her laptop as I enter her room. She looks at me and then gets busy with her laptop again.

"Ummm, did you see that article?"

"Which article?"

"I sent you the link."

She starts reading the article. I wait for her to finish.

"So, the secret's out now. Do you both wanted a secret relationship or something?"

"It's not that... We're not dating, actually."

I narrate the whole story to her, and she bursts out laughing. The audacity.

"No, but why am I not surprised?" She says between her fits of laughter.

"So, you knew it was all fake?"

"Kinda," she says.

"Kinda?" I ask.

"I mean, Kishan's acting was pretty convincing, but yours..."

"What should I do now?"

"What did Darshan suggest?"

"We're going to have a meeting tomorrow."

"Oh... you talked with Ishan?"

"No, I don't have his contact."

"Haww, you don't have your boyfie's number. What a shame."

"Mat kar... arrhhhhh, this is so bad. I messed up everything. And Ishan, how is he going to react?"

---

As I get into bed to sleep, sleep feels miles away from me. Just today, I was thinking life was being too blissful, but Bhagwaan se yeh dekha nhi gya, He is like: you are having too much fun. Let me add some twist to your life.

God knows what's going to happen in the meeting tomorrow, and other than that, how Ishan is going to react. I'm afraid.

~~~

Title: Chapter : 07
Chapter_Text:
•ISHAN KISHAN•

As we both reached the mountain's peak after a two-hour trek, a sense of anticipation filled my heart. Finally, as we settled onto a rocky top, our breath came in short, and we looked ahead.

The sky was a canvas of pastel hues, with streaks of pink, orange, and gold merging together, casting a warm glow. A gentle breeze carried the mild scent of earth. The view in front of us was enchanting.

We trekked this far to see the sunset, and because of that, I am a bit tired, but it was totally worth it.

Mayank took out his camera and started capturing the beauty in front of us. Moments like this make you feel truly alive.

Mayank and I decided to come here as all our other plans were getting canceled for one reason or another. We both are mountain enthusiasts, so nothing could be better than this. And I needed some nature as well because my schedule of past few weeks hardly allowed me to go anywhere.

After filling our senses with this enchanting beauty, we trekked down, which took another 2 hours. Now we are both bone-tired, so we head towards our resort where we are staying.

As we entered, a girl, probably in her mid-twenties, gave us a weird look.What did we do girl?I ignore her judging look.

I took a long, warm shower, and now I am sleepy, even though it's just 8 pm. As I put the hairdryer on the table, Mayank knocked on my door. I opened the door, and he was standing with his laptop.

"You didn't tell me that you are dating."

"Whaaaaa-" Before I could complete the word, he plopped down on the bed and turned his laptop screen. "You are dating Shubman Gill, and I don't know about this?"

This caught me off guard. "See this article right here." I didn't know which article he was talking about. I bent down a little to read whatever he was showing me.

As I finished reading the article, I froze, my eyes wide with shock. "Were you two in a secret relationship, huh?" He asked with a curious expression on his face, but I remained silent.

"Ishan......Ishan Kishan, are you even listening to me?"

"Huh?"

"Care to explain this?" he ordered.

I looked at him with a blank expression and then again at the article. I noticed that this article already had over 3 million views in just 4 hours.

"Now I know why that girl was giving us weird looks, she thought that I am cheating on Shubman with you."

Mayank got more confused. "What are you talking about?"

"Mayank, Shubman and I are not in a relationship." I ran my hand through my hair as the gravity of the situation dawned upon me.

For the next 10 minutes, I explained to Mayank what actually happened, how Shubman asked me to act as his boyfriend, and I helped him.

Now I know why I was feeling like something bad was going to happen, but this is not bad; this is worse.

"Shubman knew about this article?" he asked. "I don't kno-" My phone started ringing. It's my manager.

"Hello, sir, did you read that article?" His voice was a little panicky. "Yes, I just read it." I told him about the whole fake date scenario, he didn't seem to judge but seemed genuinely concerned because even if all this was true, the media getting any news before you tell them anything is not a good sign.

"Shubman sir's manager called me, he said that we should discuss this together before taking any step or releasing any statement. The meeting is tomorrow morning, and he asked for your presence."

Okay, this means Shubman knows too.

"Okay, I will be there as soon as possible."

We are 4 hours away from Delhi, so I have to leave now and get some sleep after I reach there. Only a few minutes ago, I was tired and sleepy, and now sleep doesn't seem like an option.

I told Mayank that he didn't need to bother himself for my sake. I booked a cab and packed my stuff, which wasn't much.

On my way to Delhi, Mom called me. Before picking up the phone, I prayed that please let this call be about my whereabouts and not about the mess that is spreading like fire. If only God had listened to me. The call was only about that fiasco, and I told her that I will explain everything to her, but not now.

She doesn't seem mad because she thought I am dating, but she is angry because I didn't tell her. Ha, even I didn't know that I was dating someone.

My phone is blasting with notifications; I put it on silent mode and shut my eyes. I want to shut my brain too.

I reached Delhi around 1 am, my brother was confused as to why I am here so early as my trip was for three days. I told him I would explain everything later.

My alarm goes off, but I am still very sleepy. But as soon as the memories of last night hit me, I sit up straight with a jerk. Holy Shit, I have to attend the meeting today, and I am still in bed.

I get ready as fast as I can and drive to the office. As I open the door of the meeting room, everyone's heads snap towards me. Of course I am late.

My eyes fell on Shubman as he looked at me with a blank expression. I sit beside Shubman as that's the only chair that was empty.

A person with a grim expression, who I think is Shubman's manager, starts speaking.

~~~

Title: Chapter : 08
Chapter_Text:
•SHUBMAN GILL•

We are currently in the meeting room with a total of 5 people, including myself. The other four are Darshan, Ishan's manager, a man who is probably in his early thirties, from some BCCI department, though I am not quite sure which one, and Nia.

Nia is Darshan's assistant, or let's say she is doing her PR internship under him. She is also a part of the event management team hired by many famous people, especially cricketers.

I can bet that Darshan didn't want to include Nia in this, But Nia being the Drama lover that she is, included herself.

We are all waiting for Ishan to arrive. When I asked his manager, whose name is Akash, about him, he told me that Ishan was out of Delhi at a resort for a short vacation with his friend and returned yesterday.

And now I know for sure Ishan has one more reason to be pissed at me. Not only is he in this mess because of me, but he also had to cut short his vacation because of all this drama. If I were in his position, I would be so mad.

Darshan is busy on his laptop doing God knows what. Nia passed him a coffee cup. He took a swig from the cup without turning his gaze from the laptop. "This is not my usual, it's not strong enough," he says, looking at Nia. She, in turn, looks at me.

A little while ago:

I parked my car and started walking toward the main entrance. Nia was also approaching the main entrance with steady steps, her phone trapped between her ear and shoulder because both of her hands were full. In one hand, she was holding a laptop, tablet, and some files, and in the other hand, she was holding a cup of coffee.

When she saw me, she approached and gave me the coffee cup to hold her phone properly against her ear to talk to whoever she was talking with. The cup was cool against my palm. I took a large sip from it and spat it out as soon as the strong coffee hit my taste buds.

Nia looked at me with wide eyes, my face morphing into an unpleasant expression because of the bitter taste. She hastily cut the call. "Sir, that was for Darshan, sir." Now, my eyes widened.

"Ummm, I thought it was for me," I said, wiping my mouth. I should have guessed already, otherwise, who drinks such bitter coffee? "Do you think he'll notice?" I asked her as she inspected the amount of coffee still in the cup. "Sir, you practically made out with the cup while taking a sip, of course, he will notice," she said, grimacing, "and I don't have time to bring another one."

"Uh... just add some more cold water to it, and it will be full again," I suggested. "And it will be less bitter that way." She gave me an 'are you serious' look and shook her head.

_

I guess she actually considered my advice and added more water to it. "Uh... I think the order got swapped," she says and gives me a look which basically says:See, your idea didn't work.

A few minutes later, the door opens and everyone's heads snap towards its direction. Ishan enters the room. His eyes meet mine, but I don't see any resentment in them towards me, which makes me a bit relaxed. He sits beside me.

"As we all are aware of the mess that got created because of that article," he says, looking directly into my soul. "And this meeting is held to come up with some solution."

"What about suing the media house that published the article?" asks the man whose name I still don't know.

"No, we cannot do that because if we sue them, they can sue us back for defaming them, and they have enough proof about the article being true," Darshan replies in a measured tone.

"Couldn't we just say that the article was fake?" I ask the obvious question.

"No, we can't, Shubman, because the media house that published that is known for giving accurate information," he gives a brief look to his laptop screen and continues, "I tried searching about their background, and they seem spotless."

"Even if they take it down, there are hundreds of other articles reciting the same words, and not just that, people have screenshots, even some fans came forward to tell that they also spotted you two together," Akash states calmly

Ishan and I just sit their listening to them carefully, Ishan does not seem upset with me.

"Your fans have pulled old photos and videos of your interactions with each other," it's Nia. "And they have found something as well."

"What?" asks Ishan, confusion etched on his face. This is the first word he spoke after coming here. "See this," Nia turns her tablet towards us. There is a picture, actually two pictures in one frame. My picture is on the right and Ishan's on the left, and we are wearing the same shirt.

I take a closer look at the shirt and I realize it's not mine; it's actually -

Flashback:

"Kya ho gya tujhe?" asks Virat bhaiya. "My luggage got misplaced, and now I don't have anything to wear for the event," I tell him while whining.

"Your jeans is pretty good," he gives me a once-over look. "Haan bhaiya, but I don't have a shirt for the event," I say. I am wearing a printed tee which is definitely not a good option to wear at a BCCI event, especially when you're a player yourself.

"Take something from Rahuliya, you both share the same height," Rahuliya is Rahul bhaiya as Virat bhaiya loves to call him endearingly.

"Oh, okay, but where is he?" I ask, being clueless about Rahul bhaiya's whereabouts. "He must be in his room," Virat bhaiya tells me his room number.

The door of his room is already open, and he is rummaging through his stuff. "Rahul bhaiya," he looks towards me. "Ah, actually, I don't have anything to wear tonight. Can I borrow something from you?" He smiles at my hesitation. "Of course... wait a minute."

As he starts rummaging through his stuff again, my phone starts ringing, so I step out to answer it. When the call ends, Rahul bhaiya is standing there with a shirt in his hand. "Here, it will look great on you," he says, handing me a blue shirt with half sleeves.

Flashback ends.

The shirt that we both are wearing in this picture is the same one that Rahul bhaiya gave me that day. I glance towards Ishan. He senses my confusion and whispers, "Rahul bhaiya had only one good shirt, and he was going to wear that, so he asked me for something. That's how you ended up wearing my shirt that day."

"Ohh," it's all I'm able to say. I look at the picture again; Ishan's shirt is fitting me so well despite our height and body difference, which is kind of surprising.

"They are considering the pic that was posted by Shubman as a hint," says Akash.

Now it's Ishan's turn to be confused, and now I whisper to him about how that picture got posted on my account, and now it's his turn to say, "Ohh."

The man whose name I didn't bother to ask speaks, "We are already neck-deep in rumors, be it Rohit and Virat's fighting rumor or about the false accusations some of our players faced regarding drugs or be it about match-fixing rumor. All these are ruining the image of BCCI."

He is right; some people actually think that Virat and Rohit bhaiya hate each other, and they don't have any bonding. I mean, come on, whenever any important player of the opponent team gets out during the match, Virat bhaiya runs to hug Rohit bhaiya first. And not just that, they always defend each other in press conferences. Can't people just see that?

"Does anyone have any idea?" asks Darshan, looking at everyone. No one says anything for a whole two minutes.

And in those two minutes, I notice Darshan's socks from under the table. I can see a hint of them from where his trouser ends. And he is wearing floral-printed socks. I am not kidding; he is literally wearing socks with pink flowers on them. I want to laugh now, but I know for sure that if I laugh at this situation, then the distance between Darshan's hand and my neck will close off real quick.

"I have an idea," Nia responds to Darshan's question. Everyone is looking at her curiously. Darshan gives her a quick nod, and she proceeds to tell her idea.

"When I closely look at this matter, I realize that even though this dating news came out in a quite scandalous way, it's receiving a positive response.

Yeah, we have received some homophobic remarks as well, but they got outnumbered by the people who are actually happy or at least okay with them dating.

Last night, they both were trending on X, previously known as Twitter. People are making their edits and fan art.

And when we open the comment section under Shubman sir's post, we can see a lot of positive comments, and there were people who are genuinely curious about the dating thing."

She reads some comments for us:

"Damn, I didn't notice before, but they look so freaking perfect together."

"Omg omg omg, no way these two are dating, they look so cute together."

"Their chemistry is off the charts."

"They share clothes too, how cute."

"I never imagined that I will see two players of ICT dating each other, not that I am complaining."

"Get married already, you two."

"Their height difference is so cute."

"Why did you like all the comments" Darshan ask her looking into her tablet. "Uh.... Whatever I like personally should not be questioned in professional environment" She retorts with sass.

She is even giving heart eyes to both of us, which is kinda baffling to me.

As she was reading the comments, I open my Insta and click on the comments, and the first comment reads:

"Can't believe we are allowing the western virus to enter here. They both should be removed from the ICT."

As I read the comment, Ishan practically flinches, and I regret saying it out loud.

"Please bother to scroll down a little," Nia says, looking at me with a serious expression. "As I said earlier, there are homophobic comments, but they are very few. People are really supportive of you two."

I obey her and look at other comments, and she is right. I can see a lot of positive comments and some neutral ones too, who couldn't care less about our dating life as long as we keep hitting fours and sixes.

"And I also noticed another thing; from last evening, the other rumors related to the players kind of died down, and everyone is talking about this," she scrolls her tablet.

"What are you implying here?" Ishan asks.

"I am implying that people are loving this romantic angle, they want something, so we should give them something,"

I raise my eyebrows, and she continues, "This dating thing is resulting in a positive PR thing, and because of this, people are not dwelling much on negative rumors regarding ICT. So why don't we keep feeding them this romantic angle, which they seem to love?"

"Makes sense," says the BCCI man.

"So you are saying that they should date each other for real?" Akash questions.

"No, they should fake date each other, meaning they are dating only in the public eye, but in reality, they are just teammates,"

"No, this is so wrong," finally, Ishan speaks. "We shouldn't do that."

"This is the only option left, Mr. Kishan," Darshan retorts.

"But we are cricketers, not con artists. We shouldn't do this,"

"Ishan sir, I agree with you, but anything other than this will result in more mess,"

Ishan is now getting frustrated.

~~~
